|desc={{p|Tinkaton|Tinkie}} (Japanese: '''デカヌちゃん''' ''Dekanu-chan'') is Poppy's first known Pokémon. She was used alongside {{p|Copperajah|Rajah}} in her battle against [[Dot]] and {{an|Iono}}, where she battled against [[Dot's Quaxly]] and Iono's {{p|Bellibolt}}.

Tinkie's known moves are {{m|Gigaton Hammer}}, {{m|Brick Break}}, and {{m|Rock Smash}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké

|desc={{p|Copperajah|Rajah}} (Japanese: '''ダイオウちゃん''' ''Daiou-chan'') is Poppy's second known Pokémon. It was used alongside {{p|Tinkaton|Tinkie}} in her battle against [[Dot]] and {{an|Iono}}, where it battled against [[Dot's Quaxly]] and Iono's {{p|Bellibolt}}, only to be defeated by the latter.

Rajah's known moves are {{m|Sandstorm}} and {{m|Rock Slide}}.}}
